title: Words from the people who keep coming back.
subtitle: Reviews from regulars, critics, and the friends who tell their friends.

items.name: Amelia Hart
items.quote: The restraint is the showstopper. Nothing on the plate is fighting for attention, and somehow everything is unforgettable.

items.name: Daniel Okafor
items.quote: We've taken every important guest in our lives to that twelve-seat room. It has never once been ordinary.

items.name: Sofia Marchetti
items.quote: Chef Voss cooks with a calmness you can taste. It's the most generous form of confidence.

items.name: Jordan Lim
items.quote: Their pairing notes read like poetry and pour like opera. I learn something every visit.

items.name: Priya Raghavan
items.quote: They remembered our wedding date and slipped a single perfect fig into our dessert. Quiet hospitality at its absolute best.
